request_payload.exposure_text: As someone who values national security and has served our country, I'm concerned about the lack of focus on civil defense preparedness. While some argue for more spending on military hardware, we can't ignore the vulnerabilities in our own communities. Look at what happened in [Redacted County] last year - their emergency response systems were outdated and underfunded. We need to invest in local preparedness to truly protect Americans. #NationalSecurity #CivilDefense
